title: Amy Bell Charities celebrates top Cradock High matric achiever
description: CRADOCK NEWS - Zenande Rasimeni, an Amy Bell...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NEWS - Zenande Rasimeni, an Amy Bell Scholarship recipient and one of Cradock High School’s top matric achievers, has achieved an outstanding 81.4% average and five distinctions.","html":"CRADOCK NEWS - Zenande Rasimeni, an Amy Bell Scholarship recipient and one of Cradock High School’s top matric achievers, has achieved an outstanding 81.4% average and five distinctions."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Zenande is a student in the Amy Bell Upliftment through Education programme."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Irvin Tam, managing director of Amy Bell Charities in Cradock, said Zenande’s achievement speaks to what happens when the organisation equips and uplifts children through education, boundless love and kindness.","html":"Irvin Tam, managing director of Amy Bell Charities in Cradock, said Zenande’s achievement speaks to what happens when the organisation equips and uplifts children through education, boundless love and kindness."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“At Amy Bell Charities we are extremely proud of Zenande and we look forward to the success that she will make of her university journey.”Tam also extended a word of appreciation to the generous donors in the wildlife industry, who opened their hearts and chose to give, and believed in futures beyond themselves.","html":"“At Amy Bell Charities we are extremely proud of Zenande and we look forward to the success that she will make of her university journey.”

Tam also extended a word of appreciation to the generous donors in the wildlife industry, who opened their hearts and chose to give, and believed in futures beyond themselves."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Their generosity has turned hope into reality and made moments like this possible, and are still changing lives on an ongoing basis.","html":"Their generosity has turned hope into reality and made moments like this possible, and are still changing lives on an ongoing basis."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I wish to say thank you to Amy Bell Charities,” said Zenande.","html":"“I wish to say thank you to Amy Bell Charities,” said Zenande."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The work, that you are part of, makes a real difference in our lives.","html":"“The work, that you are part of, makes a real difference in our lives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We appreciate the everyday support and love that make it so much easier to grow, lead and focus.”","html":"We appreciate the everyday support and love that make it so much easier to grow, lead and focus.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She also extended a word of appreciation towards the teachers, mentors and extra lesson teachers for their patience, sacrifices, and their commitment.","html":"She also extended a word of appreciation towards the teachers, mentors and extra lesson teachers for their patience, sacrifices, and their commitment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Your quiet dedication does not go unseen, and today it shines brightly through Zenande’s achievements,” said Tam.","html":"“Your quiet dedication does not go unseen, and today it shines brightly through Zenande’s achievements,” said Tam."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We are deeply grateful, proud and reminded that when love leads, lives are changed.”","html":"“We are deeply grateful, proud and reminded that when love leads, lives are changed.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Amy Bell Charities celebrates top Cradock High matric achiever
